'''Sanola Ti''' was a niece of [[Kirana Ti]] and one of the young [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Sanola was described as a good, studious [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who had inherited her aunt's skills as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. She was one of many Jedi who flew [[StealthX]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] during the conflict, flying as both Skywalker's wingman and as [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' wingman in [[Rakehell Squadron]].

During the operation to destroy [[Centerpoint Station]], Sanola and the Rakehells engaged [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. She suffered significant battle damage and was ordered by Antilles to pull out of the engagement.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{1st}}
